name: Kuda Nigeria Neobank API
what_it_does: Kuda Nigeria neobank REST API for fintech developers and businesses to access Nigeria's banking infrastructure through Kuda's CBN-licensed digital bank platform for account creation, fund transfers, virtual account provisioning, and bank data services for Nigerian fintech and B2B banking integration. Enables AI agents to manage virtual account creation for Nigeria payment collection automation, handle fund transfer via NIP for Nigeria instant interbank payment automation, access transaction history retrieval for Nigeria banking data automation, retrieve account balance monitoring for Nigeria financial health automation, manage bulk payment disbursement for Nigeria payroll and gig automation, handle BVN verification for Nigeria KYC automation, access account statement generation for Nigeria financial record automation, retrieve debit card management for Nigeria consumer product automation, manage savings and investment account for Nigeria wealth automation, and integrate Kuda with Nigerian fintech, payroll, and marketplace platforms for end-to-end Nigeria banking automation.
use_cases: Provisioning virtual accounts for Nigeria payment collection from fintech agents
Processing NIP interbank transfers from Nigeria payment disbursement agents
Verifying BVN for Nigeria KYC from identity verification agents
Retrieving transaction history from Nigeria banking data agents
not_for: Non-Nigeria banking (Kuda is Nigeria CBN-licensed bank)
High-volume enterprise banking (use GTBank or Zenith Bank API for enterprise Nigeria banking)
Card acquiring (Kuda is account/transfer focused; use Flutterwave for card acceptance)
best_when: A Nigerian fintech, marketplace, or B2B platform wanting AI agents to automate virtual account creation, NIP fund transfers, BVN verification, and transaction management through Kuda's CBN-licensed neobank API.
avoid_when: B2B API ACCESS IS NOT CONSUMER-FACING: Kuda B2B API is separate from consumer app; automated B2B integration must use B2B API credentials not consumer app credentials; automated consumer app credentials in B2B API creates unauthorized access. CBN REGULATORY COMPLIANCE REQUIREMENTS: Kuda is CBN-licensed; automated banking operations must comply with CBN KYC/AML requirements; automated account creation without proper BVN verification creates regulatory non-compliance. NIP TRANSFER HAS DAILY LIMITS: Kuda NIP transfers have per-transaction and daily limits per account tier; automated bulk disbursement must stay within transfer limits; automated unlimited bulk transfer creates limit exceeded error. VIRTUAL ACCOUNT NAMING RESTRICTIONS: Kuda virtual accounts must follow CBN naming conventions; automated virtual account creation must validate name format; automated malformed account name creates CBN compliance rejection.

auth.notes: Kuda uses API Key for B2B API authentication. REST API with JSON. Lagos, Nigeria HQ. Founded 2019 by Babs Ogundeyi and Musty Mustapha. Backed by Target Global, Valar Ventures ($91M raised). CBN-licensed MFB. Products: Virtual accounts, NIP transfers, BVN verification, account statements, card management. GDPR equivalent. CBN regulated. Nigeria's leading neobank. Competes with Mono and Stitch for Nigeria banking API.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — B2B API access requires business agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-transaction fees for transfers and virtual accounts; negotiated B2B pricing
pricing.notes: Lagos NG. Valar Ventures backed. Per-transaction fees in NGN. B2B API requires business engagement.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; transfer and account APIs throttled; webhooks for transaction events

known_agent_gotchas: B2B API SEPARATE FROM CONSUMER APP: Kuda B2B API is distinct from consumer-facing app; automated B2B integration requires B2B-specific credentials and onboarding; automated consumer app credential use in B2B context creates unauthorized access

NIGERIAN NIP SETTLEMENT TIMING: NIP (NIBSS Instant Payment) transfers settle within seconds during banking hours but may queue during off-hours; automated payment confirmation must handle delayed settlement; automated immediate settlement assumption for all times creates premature payment confirmation

BVN VERIFICATION ONE-TIME PER CUSTOMER: Kuda BVN verification should be performed once per customer and cached; automated per-transaction BVN verification creates excessive verification calls and potential rate limit issues

VIRTUAL ACCOUNT TIER LIMITS TRANSACTION VOLUME: Kuda virtual accounts have tier-based transaction limits tied to KYC level; automated payment collection must monitor tier limits; automated unlimited collection on low-KYC-tier account creates limit exceeded during high volume

WEBHOOK EVENTS REQUIRE REGISTERED ENDPOINT: Kuda webhooks are delivered to pre-registered endpoint; automated webhook processing must use registered URL; automated unregistered webhook endpoint creates transaction events not delivered
agent_readiness.security_notes: Nigeria neobank. CBN-licensed. API key. NG. Banking and transaction data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Nigeria neobank. CBN-licensed. API key. NG. Banking and account data.
